title: S4: Persist verifier artifacts and surface rewards in scoring/reports
description: Plan slice S4 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Emit verifier result, reward map, stdout/stderr, command metadata, and model.patch through output records/blobs; persist verifier/result.json, verifier/reward.json, logs, and model.patch; show verifier status/reward in result, score, run summary, HTML, JSON, and CSV while preserving non-verifier scoring. Likely files: src/output/types.ts, src/output/dispatcher.ts, src/output/file-provider.ts, src/scoring/types.ts, src/scoring/aggregate.ts, src/visualization/types.ts, src/visualization/report.ts, src/visualization/render.ts, tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts tests/verifier.test.ts; npm run check.
notes: Persisted verifier command/stdout/stderr/reward/result artifacts, added verifierReward scoring bucket, exposed verifier/model patch details in reports, and verified with targeted tests plus npm run check.

title: S3: Add isolated hidden-test patch and model.patch artifacts
description: Plan slice S3 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Copy the verifier workspace from the agent-mutated workspace, capture model.patch before hidden tests using git diff --binary, apply hidden test.patch only in verifier workspace, and keep normal run workspace/diff artifacts unchanged by hidden tests. Likely files: src/verifier/model-patch.ts, src/verifier/hidden-patch.ts, src/verifier/run.ts, src/workspace/copy.ts, src/runner/evaluate.ts, tests/verifier.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/verifier.test.ts.
notes: Implemented model.patch capture before hidden patch application, git-apply hidden patches in the verifier phase, run artifacts, and tests covering isolation. Verified with bun test tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts, bun test tests/core.test.ts, and npm run check.

title: S2: Run a post-agent verifier phase and parse rewards
description: Plan slice S2 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. After all agent steps complete, run a verifier command against a separate verifier workspace. Acceptance: reward.json parses to a numeric reward map; reward.txt parses as {reward:number}; malformed/missing/empty reward files produce typed verifier failure; verifier result affects pass/fail only for verifier-enabled cases. Likely files: src/runner/evaluate.ts, src/runner/result.ts, src/verifier/types.ts, src/verifier/reward.ts, src/verifier/run.ts, src/docker/runner.ts, tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts, tests/verifier.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/verifier.test.ts tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts.
notes: Implemented post-agent verifier execution, reward.txt/reward.json parsing, verifier pass/status gating, and verifier lifecycle artifacts. Verified with bun test tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts, bun test tests/core.test.ts, and npm run check.

title: S1: Add verifier, attempts, reward, and network config contracts
description: Plan slice S1 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Establish strict case-level verifier, attempts, reward parsing, hidden patch path, and phase-specific network policy contracts before runner implementation. Acceptance: YAML accepts the new contracts; invalid reward paths, hidden patch paths, attempt counts, and network settings fail during config load; existing evals load unchanged. Likely files: src/config/schema.ts, src/config/load.ts, src/config/merge.ts, src/config/paths.ts, src/index.ts, tests/core.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/core.test.ts; npm run check.
notes: Implemented strict config/load contracts for case-level verifier, attempts, reward files, hidden patch paths, and network policy. Verified with bun test tests/core.test.ts and npm run check.

title: S7: Document verifier authoring, hidden tests, pass@k, and network policy
description: Plan slice S7 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Docs explain visible assertions versus hidden verifier tasks, reward contracts, hidden patch/model.patch flow, attempts/pass@k eligibility, network policy behavior, and eval authoring checklist. Examples match parser tests and final config names. Likely files: skills/harness-evals/docs/writing-evals.md, scoring-and-judging.md, docker-workspaces-and-images.md, output-and-reports.md, cli-reference.md, docs/design/HDL.md, docs/design/lld/validation-scoring-and-judging.md. Verification: bun test tests/core.test.ts; npm run check; npm run build; npm test.
notes: Updated harness-evals docs for verifier config, reward parsing, hidden patches/model.patch, attempts/pass@k, verifier network policy, artifacts, reports, and scoring defaults. Verified with bun test, npm run check, and bun run build.

title: S6: Enforce Docker network policy controls
description: Plan slice S6 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Docker runs accept phase-specific network policy; verifier defaults to no network; agent phase preserves current default unless configured; URL allowlist parsing extracts hosts and ignores env placeholders; standard Docker enforces --network none or fails actionably for unsupported allowlist policy. Likely files: src/config/schema.ts, src/config/load.ts, src/docker/network.ts, src/docker/args.ts, src/docker/runner.ts, tests/docker-network.test.ts, tests/docker-image-resolver.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/docker-network.test.ts tests/docker-image-resolver.test.ts.
notes: Implemented Docker network policy plumbing for verifier runs, including --network none/default/allowlist metadata and tests. Verified with bun test tests/core.test.ts, bun test tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts, and npm run check.

title: S5: Add attempts expansion and Pier-style pass@k aggregation
description: Plan slice S5 from .pi/plans/plan-2026-05-28_13-50-03.html. Repeat each case/agent/model in isolated run dirs with attempt metadata; group summaries by case/agent/provider/model; compute pass@k only when each attempt has one binary verifier reward; treat missing verifier results as non-success; exclude non-binary/multi-reward cases with a reason. Likely files: src/runner/matrix.ts, src/runner/evaluate.ts, src/runner/result.ts, src/runner/artifacts.ts, src/cli.ts, src/scoring/pass-at-k.ts, src/visualization/report.ts, src/visualization/render.ts, tests/pass-at-k.test.ts. Verification: bun test tests/pass-at-k.test.ts.
notes: Implemented case/CLI attempts expansion, attempt metadata, binary verifier reward pass@k aggregation, and visualization summary exposure. Verified with bun test tests/runner-lifecycle.test.ts, bun test tests/core.test.ts, and npm run check.
